summary: Fusion kurtis with palazzo sets show the strongest signal across all four sources — but with an important caveat. Search momentum is highest, 3 competitors are advertising heavily, marketplace ranks are top-tier, and review sentiment is strong. However: heavy discounting (40% on Myntra) suggests demand at full price is unproven, and this is a crowded category with saturation risk. A moderate buy with re-orderable fabric is the right call.

for.signal: Strongest search momentum among all tracked trends. 'Kurti with palazzo' and 'fusion kurti set' show consistent upward search volume.
3 competitors (Libas, Westside, Aurelia) actively advertising palazzo sets. Libas campaign running 35 days — strong conviction signal.
Ranked #2 on Myntra and #4 on Ajio. 2,100+ reviews, high velocity (120 reviews/30d). Strongest marketplace signal in the dataset.
72% positive sentiment with 40 reviews analyzed. Buyers love the coordinated set concept. Good value perception.

against.signal: Libas palazzo set is at 40% discount on Myntra — rank may be heavily price-driven. Full-price demand is unproven.
High saturation risk — this is already a top-ranked category. Late entrants may face price wars.
Fabric quality complaints — buyers report 'polyester feel' not matching cotton claims. Returns possible if fabric doesn't meet expectation.
Palazzo length issue for shorter customers (under 5'2"). Returns on fit expected unless sizing is adjusted.

disagreements.detail: Top-2 rank signals high demand, but 40% discount means buyers may be price-shopping, not style-committed. If the category moves to full-price, demand could drop sharply.

missing_evidence: What is the average discount in this category? Is 40% normal or distressed?
Can we differentiate enough to avoid the price war? (unique prints, better fabric, etc.)
Supplier lead times for palazzo sets — is the supply chain pre-built or do we need new vendor relationships?
Store sell-through data from the last 2 seasons for similar co-ord set products
watch_next: Monitor discount levels on top-ranked palazzo sets — if discounts drop below 20%, full-price demand is real
Track competitor ad duration — if Libas continues past 60 days, category is still growing
Test fabric options (cotton blend vs rayon) to address 'polyester feel' complaint
Check if Myntra/Ajio add new palazzo set brands — more entrants = saturation risk
